For ages, the Crowns had been sleeping.

But something has changed.

minting_now.description:
My study on the legend of the dragon of Rhodes through the lens of Schiller's corresponding ballad "Der Kampf mit dem Drachen" from the first edition of the Book Le Dragon de l'île de Rhodes of 1829, by Retzsch.

" It  is so told ,that there was a dragon on the island of Rhodes in the  1330s, hiding

minting_now.name: Scarlet Tengu Guardian#003
minting_now.description:
A fearless guardian born from Japanese folklore and modern street culture.
Scarlet Tengu Guardian represents rebellion, protection, and untamed spirit.
The bold crimson mask, sharp black shadows, and electric turquoise accents create a powerful balance between tradition and urban energy.
This piece

ORBS FLOATERS
minting_now.description:
ORBS is the evolution of FLOATERS. The circles dissolved. The rings broke apart. What remained was something greater.
Generative. Forever. 🌀

minting_now.description: Fallen Angel Punks is a pixel art collection that merges the purity of angels with the rebellion of punks. a collection built around a simple idea:
the world is scripted

Together. 1 lucky winner takes home a pair of Shokz OpenRun Pro earphones (Kipchoge Edition) + Azuki "In the Moment" cap. Registration open Locals @ Azuki HQ Tomorrow (Tue 4/21) at 6:30pm, See you there!
Happy National Anime Day!
